official_sources.surface: ApolloX spot API family and fapi futures profile
official_sources.evidence: ApolloX spot API family exists separately from the V1 fapi futures/perpetual surface used by this adapter.

runtime_isolation: Do not reuse fapi perpetual request builders for spot until the spot host, listen-key/private stream and product-scope signing are audited.
